originalTitle: Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Official Trailer | Overwatch
content: Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den? A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies. Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down. That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more. Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer when it arrives in-game TOMORROW. Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2 _ Follow #Overwatch for the latest news: Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playoverwatch TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@overwatch Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/playoverwatch Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/playoverwatch
chineseContent: 你准备好踏入虎穴了吗？随着我们最新伤害英雄 Shion 的到来，利爪统治的新篇章就此拉开。作为桥本家族最可怕的长老，紫苑用她的双半自动手枪和一辆可以撞向敌人的摩托车将危险的新武器带到了战场。在全新的混合地图“霓虹灯交叉口”中穿越东京的街道，每个角落都充满了对日本文化的致敬和复活节彩蛋。东京也在我们的新 Anima Strike 元活动中变得栩栩如生，您可以根据您选择的路径获得新的奖励。但这还不是全部！通过第 3 季战斗通行证和商店解锁全新化妆品，例如 Illari 的 Ascendant Phoenix 神话英雄皮肤、Hanzo 的 Tokyo Rebel 神话武器皮肤、添加了视觉特效的新 Ultra 皮肤、作为我们即将推出的 YOASOBI 合作一部分​​的新皮肤等等。体验《第三季：勇闯虎穴》明天在游戏中提供的一切。 《守望先锋》可在 PC 和主机上免费畅玩，包括 Nintendo Switch™ 2 _ 关注 #Overwatch 了解最新消息： Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/playoverwatch TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@overwatch Twitter：http://www.twitter.com/playoverwatch Facebook：http://www.facebook.com/playoverwatch
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
